title: galium parisiense f. anglicum
intro: Galium parisiense f. anglicum, also known as the English bedstraw, is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Galium parisiense f. anglicum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
